public_registration.page_description: Submit a registration request and wait for administrator approval.
public_registration.success_description:
Your registration request has been submitted successfully.
Please wait for approval from the administrator.

notifications.submit_failed_title: Unable to submit your registration request
notifications.submit_failed_description: Please review the information and try again.
notifications.email_in_use_title: This email is already in use
notifications.email_in_use_description: Please use a different email address or contact the administrator if you already have an account.
notifications.pending_request_title: A registration request is already pending
notifications.pending_request_description: This email already has a request waiting for approval. Please wait for the result or contact the administrator.
notifications.pending_invitation_title: An invitation is already waiting for you
notifications.pending_invitation_description: This email already has an invitation from the administrator. Please check your email inbox.
notifications.conflict_description: This information already exists in the system, or there is already a pending request. Please check the email address or contact the administrator.
notifications.invalid_data_title: The information is not valid yet
notifications.invalid_data_description: Please review the form and try again.
notifications.access_denied_title: The request cannot be submitted right now
notifications.access_denied_description: Please try again or contact the administrator if the problem continues.
notifications.server_unavailable_description: Please try again later or contact the administrator if the problem continues.
notifications.server_error_title: The system is not ready to process your request
notifications.server_error_description: The request could not be completed right now. Please try again again later.

Your password has been saved successfully.

directory.page_description: Manage users from the administrator side.
directory.delete_description: This action will soft delete the user in Operis and disable the account in Keycloak.

invitations.page_description: Create invitations for users to confirm their identity later.
invitations.card_description: Create an invitation first, then send the link so the recipient can confirm and set up their account.

registration.page_description: Review user registration requests and approve or reject them.
registration.reason_optional_for_approve: A reason is optional when approving

master.departments_page_description: Manage system master data for departments.
master.job_titles_page_description: Manage system master data for job titles.
master.positions_page_description: Manage system master data for permanent positions.
master.project_roles_page_description: Manage system master data for project-specific roles.
master.departments_description: Create, update, and remove department master data before assigning it to users.

master.positions_description: Create, update, and remove permanent position master data before assigning it to users.
master.project_roles_description: Create, update, and remove project role master data separately from permanent positions.
master.delete_soft_delete_description: Confirm soft delete and provide a reason.

affiliations.page_description: Assign division, department, and permanent position to users from the permanent organization structure.

projects.page_description: Create and manage projects before assigning project roles and members.

projects.delete_description: Confirm the soft delete and provide a reason.
